label: Strategy Classification
definition: Describes a company's stated strategic direction, market positioning, or declared competitive intent at the time of the study

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Analyst forecast about whether a company, product, or strategy will succeed or fail; forward-looking judgment made at time of study

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Retrospective record of what actually happened to a company, product, or technology after the study date; used to assess prescience

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Empirical evaluation of a specific technology product or system based on hands-on testing, performance measurement, or documented behavior

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative or time-based measurement from testing; a specific metric value obtained through direct measurement or structured evaluation

label: Framework Factor
definition: A component or variable within an analytical framework or model used to structure the analysis; a dimension of a multi-factor evaluation scheme

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative or qualitative data point about market size, pricing, cost structures, or commercial dynamics derived from research

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Analyst judgment, interpretation, or recommendation based on experience and domain knowledge rather than directly measured data

label: Field Research
definition: Primary research conducted through direct interaction with products, services, or market participants in real-world settings

label: Product Testing
definition: Hands-on evaluation of a specific product through direct use, installation, and functionality testing by the researcher

label: High Confidence
definition: Finding is directly supported by the source text with clear evidence; minimal interpretive uncertainty

label: Medium Confidence
definition: Finding is supported by the source text but requires some interpretive inference or extrapolation

label: Low Confidence
definition: Finding is inferred from limited evidence in the source text or involves significant extrapolation

label: Lab Journal
definition: Aberdeen Group format for hands-on product evaluations; first-person account of researcher's direct experience with a specific product or technology

label: Consumer IT
definition: Products and services at the intersection of consumer electronics and information technology; includes PCs, cameras, and home networking aimed at mainstream consumers
